Notice Of Motion Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Plaintiffs??? Application For Writ Of Attachment And Right To Attach Order
Off Calendar Dec-11-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: PLAINTIFFS MATTHEW HEIDEMAN, AJ NARULA, DIAMOND BELL, DARRON MAKROKANIS, JOHN MILLER, DAN MENNELL, and STAN TONG's Application For Writ Of Attachment And Right To Attach Order.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's application for a writ of attachment is denied. Pretrial attachment is a harsh and disfavored remedy, so the requirements for issuance are strictly construed against the applicant, which bears the burden of proving every element. (CCP 484.090(a); Martin v. Aboyan (1983) 148 Cal.App.3d 826, 831; Loeb & Loeb v. Beverly Glen Music, Inc. (1985) 186 Cal.App.3d 1110, 1116; Pos-A-Traction, Inc. v. Kelly-Springfield Tire Co. (C.D. Cal 2000) 112 F.Supp.2d 1178, 1181; Blastrac, N.A. v. Concrete Solutions & Supply (C.D. Cal. 2010) 678 F.Supp.2d 1001, 1005.)

Here, plaintiffs fail to prove multiple CCP 484.090(a) elements, each fatal.

First, probable validity of claims must be proved with admissible evidence, but plaintiffs rely on their counsel's spin of their unverified complaint, his own declaration and dubious deposition clips. (CCP 484.090(a)(2); Opp. 17:17-20:5.)

Second, plaintiffs' papers have the distinct look and feel of an attempt to force settlement and/or gain litigation advantage - both improper purposes. (CCP 484.090(a)(3); Opp. 21:5-23:3.)

Third, plaintiffs' proposed writ of attachment seeks to bind entities not party to this litigation and to encompass undefined funds and assignments - ambiguities that would likely foment further litigation and promote mischief. (CCP 484.090(a)(1).)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***After hearing, an order is signed.
